name: Hero editorial portrait — oxblood backdrop
purpose: Marketing hero still. Full-body editorial portrait confirming identity lock holds under a different wardrobe (editorial mode). The closing image of the short.
midjourney_prompt: editorial full-body portrait, mid-20s East Asian woman in floor-length oxblood silk bias-cut slip dress, thin silver ear cuff on left ear, jet black collarbone hair with two asymmetric face-framing strands, porcelain matte skin, glossy oxblood almond manicure, unsmiling composed gaze, oxblood seamless backdrop, single soft key from camera left, anamorphic 2.39:1 fine grain, cinematic editorial --ar 3:4 --style raw
nano_banana_2_prompt:
Subject: same mid-20s East Asian woman as reference turnaround — jet black collarbone hair with two asymmetric face-framing strands, porcelain matte skin, almond dark eyes, nude-mauve matte lips, glossy oxblood almond manicure. Wearing a floor-length oxblood silk bias-cut slip dress, thin silver ear cuff on her left ear only, no other jewellery, bare feet.

Style: editorial fashion portrait, Vogue Italia register, anamorphic 2.39:1 feel, fine grain.

Composition: full-body, head to floor, subject centered, slight weight on left leg, right hand loosely at hip, left arm relaxed, unsmiling direct gaze to camera.

Lighting: single large soft key from camera-left at 45 degrees, subtle silver bounce from camera-right, cool-to-neutral temperature, shadow rolloff soft and controlled.

Background: seamless oxblood #6b0f1a paper, evenly lit, no texture.

Color palette: oxblood dress on oxblood ground, porcelain skin, black hair, silver ear cuff, oxblood nails — monochromatic red with porcelain break.

Avoid: smiling, teeth showing, extra jewellery, warm orange skin tone, HDR glow, props, background gradient, lens flare.
